common.title: Title
common.tryDifferentFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters

auth.loginDescription: Enter your email and password below to log in
auth.confirmPasswordDescription: This is a secure area. Please confirm your password before continuing.
auth.twoFactorDescription: Please confirm access to your account by entering the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.
auth.verifyEmailDescription: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
auth.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Please enter your new password below
auth.recoveryCodeDescription: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.
auth.authCodeDescription: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor and manage your digital signage
dashboard.activityChartDesc: Content played in the last 7 days

players.title: Players
players.subtitle: Manage your digital signage players
players.limitReached: Player limit reached for this plan
players.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
players.tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters.
players.getStarted: Get started by creating your first player.
players.activationCodeHelp: Enter the code displayed on the screen
players.updateIntervalInfo: Content is automatically updated every 30 minutes.
players.regionPlaylistRequired: All layout regions must have a playlist selected.
players.createDescription: Register a new digital signage player
players.name: Name
players.registerNew: Register a new digital signage player
players.apiTokenDesc: Use this token to authenticate the player device
players.regenerateWarning: This will invalidate the current token. The player will need to be reconfigured with the new token.
players.remoteCommandsDesc: Send commands to this player device in real-time
players.commandsNote: Commands are sent instantly via push notification. The player must be online to receive them.
players.refreshPlayerDesc: Send command to refresh the playlist on the player.
players.showToastOnPlayer: Show notification on player after update
players.showToastOnPlayerDesc: When checked, the player will display a message confirming the playlist was updated.
players.remoteShortcutsDesc: List of commands available on the Android TV player remote control.
players.outdatedTooltip: Player has not synced latest playlist changes
players.passwordCallerEnabledHelp: Allows calling passwords using the remote control
players.replacePlayerDesc: Replace this player with a new device. The new device will receive all configurations.
players.replaceWarningNewFlow: The new device will be activated with all settings from this player. This player will be deleted after replacement.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.subtitle: Downloaded files status on device
downloads.noPlaylistAssigned: This player has no playlist assigned
downloads.noDataYetDesc: Download status will be updated when the player sends its next heartbeat (every 5 minutes).

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.noData: No diagnostic data available. The player has not yet sent system information.
diagnostics.locationDisclaimer: Location is approximate and based on the public IP of the internet provider.

blackScreen.title: Black Screen
blackScreen.description: Schedule when the player should display a black screen
blackScreen.priorityNote: Black screen takes priority over any playlist. When active, the player will display a black screen regardless of scheduled content.
blackScreen.disabled: Black screen disabled for this player
blackScreen.overrideHint: Click "Override Configuration" to set a specific configuration for this player.

media.title: Media Library
media.subtitle: Upload and manage your videos and images
media.uploadMediaDesc: Select the files you want to upload.
media.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and the file will be permanently removed from storage.
media.tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters.
media.getStarted: Get started by uploading your first media file.
media.updateTitleDesc: Update the title of this media
media.enterTitle: Enter a title for this media
media.uploadDesc: Upload videos and images for your digital signage
media.supportedFormats: Supported formats: MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI, JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP (max 500MB)
media.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop your file here, or click to browse
media.optimizingVideo: Video is being optimized for playback. This may take a few minutes for large files.
media.alreadyOptimized: Video is already in an optimal format and doesn't need transcoding.
media.dragAndDropMultiple: Drag and drop your files here, or click to browse
media.maxFileSizeMultiple: Videos and images up to 500MB each
media.cancelUploadDesc: Uploads are in progress. If you close now, pending files will not be sent.
media.replaceMediaDesc: Upload a new file to replace this media. All playlist references will be preserved.
media.typeWillChange: The media type will change from {{from}} to {{to}}. This may affect playlist durations.

playlists.title: Playlists
playlists.subtitle: Organize your media into playlists
playlists.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
playlists.tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters.
playlists.getStarted: Get started by creating your first playlist.
playlists.duplicateConfirm: Are you sure you want to duplicate "{{name}}"? A copy of this playlist will be created.
playlists.editPlaylistDesc: Update the details of this playlist.
playlists.deletePlaylistDesc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Players using this playlist will no longer have content to display. This action cannot be undone.
playlists.playOrderDesc: Items will play in the order shown below.
playlists.noMediaItems: No media items in this playlist
playlists.createDesc: Create a new playlist. You can add media items after creating the playlist.
playlists.keyboardHints: Space: Play/Pause | Arrow keys: Navigate | Esc: Exit
playlists.dragToReorderDesc: Drag to reorder. Items will play in the order shown below.
playlists.tryAdjustingSearch: Try adjusting your search or filters
playlists.playbackModeDesc: Choose how playlist items will be played
playlists.sequentialDesc: Plays all items from each group in order
playlists.interleavedDesc: Alternates between items from different groups
playlists.autoDesc: Distributes proportionally based on group sizes
playlists.randomDesc: Shuffles items on each playback cycle
playlists.playbackModeHelpDesc: Understand how each mode organizes playlist items when using sub-playlists.
playlists.sequentialHelpDesc: Plays all items from each group completely before moving to the next. Ideal for content that needs to be viewed in sequence.
playlists.sequentialHelpExample: Group A [1,2,3] + Group B [X,Y] → 1, 2, 3, X, Y
playlists.interleavedHelpDesc: Alternates between groups, taking one item from each (round-robin). Distributes content evenly.
playlists.interleavedHelpExample: Group A [1,2,3] + Group B [X,Y] → 1, X, 2, Y, 3
playlists.autoHelpDesc: Distributes proportionally based on group sizes. Larger groups appear more often to maintain fair proportion.
playlists.autoHelpExample: Group A [6 items] + Group B [2 items] → ratio 3:1 (A appears 3x more)
playlists.randomHelpDesc: Shuffles items randomly. Each playback cycle has a different order.
playlists.addPlaylistDesc: Select a playlist to add as a sub-playlist
playlists.addWidgetDesc: Select a widget to add to the playlist
playlists.dragItemsHere: Drag items here or use the panel on the side
playlists.durationHint: Leave empty to use the item's original duration
playlists.scheduleConflictConfirm: This schedule conflicts with the following items. Do you want to save anyway?
playlists.cannotContainSubplaylistsTooltip: This playlist is already used inside another playlist

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: Organize your media, players, and playlists with tags
tags.usedInItems: This tag is used in {{count}} items. They will be untagged.
tags.getStarted: Create your first tag to organize your content.
tags.createTagDesc: Create a new tag to organize your content.
tags.editTagDesc: Update the tag name or color.
tags.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "{{name}}"?

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage users in your organization
users.userInfoDesc: Enter the user's details. If the email already exists, they will be added to your organization.
users.editUserDesc: Change the role for this user in your organization
users.addUserDesc: Add a new user to your organization
users.inviteEmailDesc: The user will receive an invitation email with a link to set their password.
users.roleDesc: Select the user's role in this organization
users.getStarted: Add users to your organization to get started.
users.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this organization? They will lose access to all resources.
users.roleAdminDesc: Full access to manage the organization
users.roleEditorDesc: Can manage players, media, and playlists
users.addUsersToStart: Add users to this organization to get started
users.removeUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from {{tenant}}? They will lose access to this organization.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Manage roles and their permissions
roles.getStarted: Create custom roles for your organization.
roles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the role "{{name}}"?
roles.createRoleDesc: Create a new role and define its permissions
roles.editRoleDesc: Edit the permissions for this role
roles.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the responsibilities of this role
roles.permissionsDesc: Select the permissions this role should have
roles.systemRoleNameLocked: System roles cannot have their name changed.

settings.title: My Account
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings
settings.profileInfoDesc: Update your name and email address
settings.updatePasswordDesc: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Delete your account and all of its resources
settings.deleteAccountWarning: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
settings.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
settings.proceedWithCaution: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
settings.clickToResend: Click here to resend the verification email.
settings.verificationLinkSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
settings.twoFactorDesc: Add additional security to your account using two factor authentication.
settings.twoFactorEnabledDesc: With two-factor authentication enabled, you will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
settings.twoFactorDisabledDesc: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
settings.twoFactorEnabledModalDesc: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
settings.enterAuthCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
settings.enableTwoFactorDesc: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app
settings.recoveryCodesDesc: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
settings.recoveryCodesUsageInfo: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click Regenerate Codes above.

admin.recentOrgsDesc: Latest organizations added to the system

tenants.title: Organizations
tenants.subtitle: Manage all organizations in the system
tenants.tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters
tenants.getStarted: Create your first organization to get started
tenants.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
tenants.hasExistingData: This organization has existing data ({{players}} players, {{media}} media). You must remove all data before deleting.
tenants.basicInfoDesc: The organization name and unique identifier
tenants.slugHelp: Unique identifier used in URLs. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
tenants.activeStatusHelp: Inactive organizations cannot access the system
tenants.resourceLimitsDesc: Set limits for storage and players. Leave empty for unlimited.
tenants.storageLimitHelp: Maximum storage in megabytes. 1 GB = 1024 MB.
tenants.adminUserDesc: Optionally create an administrator for this organization. They will receive an email to set their password.
tenants.createAdminUserHelp: Add an administrator during organization creation
tenants.adminEmailHelp: An invitation email will be sent with a link to set the password
tenants.createOrgDesc: Create a new organization for your clients

users.title: Administrators
users.subtitle: Manage super admin users with full system access
users.getStarted: Add your first administrator to get started
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? They will lose all super admin access.
users.createAdminDesc: Create a new super admin user with full system access
users.superAdminWarning: Super administrators have full access to all organizations, users, and system settings. Only grant this access to trusted personnel.
users.basicInfoDesc: Basic information for the administrator account
users.name: Name

releases.title: App Releases
releases.subtitle: Manage OTA updates for the Android TV app
releases.currentActiveDesc: This version is being served to all players checking for updates.
releases.apiEndpointDesc: Players can optionally pass ?current_version_code=X to check if an update is available.
releases.noReleasesDesc: Upload your first APK to enable OTA updates.
releases.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete v{{version}}? The APK file will be permanently removed.
releases.activateConfirm: This will make v{{version}} the active release. All players will receive this version when checking for updates.
releases.newReleaseDesc: Upload a new APK for OTA distribution
releases.apkFileDesc: Upload the APK file for this release
releases.apkCannotChange: APK file cannot be changed after upload. Create a new release to upload a different APK.
releases.updateSettingsDesc: Configure how this update is delivered to players
releases.minVersionCodeHelp: Players below this version will be forced to update
releases.forceUpdateHelp: When enabled, all players must update to this version regardless of their current version
releases.activateImmediatelyHelp: Make this the active release right after upload
releases.howItWorksItem2: If a newer version is available, they download and install the APK
releases.howItWorksItem3: Force update or min_version_code can require immediate updates
releases.howItWorksItem4: Only one release can be active at a time

tenant.name: Organization Name
tenant.noAccessDesc: You are not associated with any organization
tenant.noAccessMessage: Your account is not associated with any organization. Please contact your administrator to request access.
tenant.orgSettingsDesc: Manage your organization's branding and preferences
tenant.customDomainDesc: Custom domain for your player devices. Leave empty to use the default.
tenant.iconDesc: Small logo displayed on player devices. Recommended: 256x256px, PNG or SVG.
tenant.splashDesc: Displayed when player devices start up. Recommended: 1920x1080px, PNG or JPG.
tenant.videoProcessingDesc: Configure how uploaded videos are processed
tenant.videoProcessingInfo: All videos are automatically transcoded for optimal compatibility with TV box devices.
tenant.optimizationQualityDesc: Select the maximum resolution for optimized videos. HD uses less storage space.
tenant.timezoneDesc: Used for scheduling content on player devices.
tenant.removeSplashDesc: Are you sure you want to remove the splash screen? Player devices will display the default Exibi splash until a new image is uploaded.
tenant.kioskSettingsDesc: Configure the password to exit kiosk mode on players
tenant.kioskExitPasswordDesc: Password required to exit kiosk mode on Android devices. Players use this password to exit the full-screen signage app.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

schedule.dateRangeDesc: Content will only be available during this period.
schedule.recurringDesc: Configure display times for each day of the week.
schedule.validityDesc: Leave blank for a permanent schedule.
schedule.addScheduleDescription: Select the days of the week and display time.
schedule.changeTypeDescription: The current schedule settings will be lost. Are you sure you want to continue?
schedule.modeAvailableDesc: Enters normal rotation during the period, may play multiple times.
schedule.modePriorityOnceDesc: Plays with priority once, then returns to normal rotation.
schedule.modePriorityLoopDesc: Loops with priority until the end of the window.
schedule.priorityOrderDesc: When there are multiple priority items, the lower number has higher priority.
schedule.behaviorModeHelpDesc: Understand how each mode affects item playback during the scheduled period.
schedule.modeAvailableHelpDesc: The item enters the normal playlist rotation during the configured period. It may play multiple times while active. Outside the period, the item doesn't appear.
schedule.modeAvailableHelpExample: Example: Lunch Menu (11am-3pm) → Appears in normal rotation only during this time
schedule.modePriorityOnceHelpDesc: When the period starts, the item interrupts the normal playlist and plays ONCE with priority. Then the normal playlist continues from where it left off. Useful for important notices.
schedule.modePriorityOnceHelpExample: Example: Meeting Notice at 2pm → Interrupts, plays 1x, playlist continues
schedule.modePriorityLoopHelpDesc: The item DOMINATES the screen in a loop for the entire period. The normal playlist is suspended. When the period ends, the normal playlist returns. Ideal for live broadcasts or emergencies.
schedule.modePriorityLoopHelpExample: Example: Event Broadcast (3pm-5pm) → Only this item plays in a loop until the period ends
schedule.priorityOrderNoteDesc: When multiple priority items are active at the same time, the item with the lowest priority number is displayed first.

layouts.title: Layouts
layouts.scheduledDesc: Configure layouts with scheduling. The default layout is used when no schedule is active.
layouts.playerScheduledDesc: Configure specific layouts for this player. If not configured, inherits layouts from the group.
layouts.playerIndependentDesc: Configure layouts for this player. Since it doesn't belong to a group, it manages its own layouts.
layouts.clickToSelect: Click on a region to select it
layouts.layoutDescription: Choose a layout to display multiple playlists on the screen simultaneously.
layouts.noLayoutDescription: Without a layout, the group's default playlist will be displayed in full screen.
layouts.scaleTypeHelp: Defines how content fills the layout regions
layouts.removeLayoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this scheduled layout? This action cannot be undone.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Track playback statistics from your players
reports.logsSubtitle: View and filter all playback logs
reports.tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting the filters to find results

events.title: System Events
events.subtitle: View boot, crash, errors and other system events
